title: Front-End Developer
duties: Provided remote consulting services to Walmart Global Tech.

Architected and delivered enterprise-scale internal applications using React Native, TypeScript, Redux, ContextAPI supporting 100K+ global associates across 8 international markets, generating and saving millions of dollars in operational costs.
Designed reusable component architecture using React, SCSS, and CSS Modules to improve UI consistency and accelerate feature development.
Refactored legacy frontend systems into modern React architecture improving performance, scalability, and maintainability.
Optimized rendering performance through efficient state management, memoization, and component-level improvements.
Improved engineering productivity and deployment reliability by enhancing Jenkins CI/CD pipelines with automated testing and deployment workflows.
Collaborated cross-functionally with product managers, designers, and backend engineers to deliver intuitive enterprise workflows.

title: Remote Software Engineer
duties: Developed full-stack applications using React, Redux, and Java Spring Boot delivering scalable web solutions.
Designed and improved dashboard UI/UX for GSTV platform using React and Redux.
Implemented RESTful APIs and backend services for AgendaOrganizer using MeteorJS and Node.js.
Collaborated in Agile development cycles delivering iterative product improvements with strong focus on maintainability and code quality.
